nodes.title: Elementary Hebrew II
nodes.description: The spoken language of everyday use with oral, aural, and written practice in speaking, reading, and comprehension. Prerequisite: HEBR 1100 or equivalent.
nodes.other_requirements: Open to Degree and PACE students

nodes.title: Elementary Hebrew I
nodes.description: The spoken language of everyday use with oral, aural, and written practice in speaking, reading, and comprehension.

nodes.title: Intermediate Hebrew I
nodes.description: Reading, translation, and discussion in Hebrew of texts selected to show the development of Hebrew culture from Biblical times to the present. Prerequisite: HEBR 1200 or equivalent.
nodes.other_requirements: Open to degree and PACE students; Colocated with HEBR 3150; Total combined enrollment: 35

nodes.title: Intermediate Hebrew II
nodes.description: Reading, translation, and discussion in Hebrew of texts selected to show the development of Hebrew culture from Biblical times to the present. Prerequisite: HEBR 2100 or equivalent.
nodes.other_requirements: equivalent; Colocated withHEBR 3150Total combined enrollment: 25; PACE students with permission and override

nodes.title: Adv Hebr & Israeli Culture
nodes.description: Opportunity to further develop communication skills in Hebrew. May be repeated for credit with different content. Topics vary by offering; periodic offering at intervals that may exceed four years. Prerequisite: HEBR 2100.
nodes.other_requirements: PACE students with permission and override
